DA OPP DFT MOT DISMISS (1382PC) FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER MARVIN CABUNTALA/WIT SWORN:SFPD SGT WILLIAM SCOTT/EXHM:PEOPLE'S 1 - NARCOTICS EVIDENCE ENVELOPE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1A - PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING GREEN LEAFY SUBSTANCE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1B - PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING 4 SMALLER BAGGIES WITH GREENLEAFY SUBSTANCE/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1C - PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING LOOSE GREEN LEAFY SUBSTANCE/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:001 AND 002/X:COUNT 3 IS CERTIFIED,/X:DEFENDANT REMAINS OUT OF CUSTODY ON COURT O,R,/CTORD:DEFENDANT'S SPR CHECK IN REQUIREMENT IS MODIFIED TO 1 TIME PER WEEK BY PHONE,/TWA/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:SPR ELIG REPORT/X:SPRGR/CTORD:DEFENDANT CHECK IN WITH SPR 5 TIMES PER WEEK BY PHONE AND PARTICIPATE IN SERVICES AS DIRECTED/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 01-03-12/VD:11-17-11 PRELIMINARY HEARING/ /CONTD:SETTINGOR DISPO/DOP/
